530 reviews. Every single one gives it 5 stars.

Into The Blue on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the snorkeling boat trip that keeps showing up in every Phu Quoc itinerary for a reason. Crystal water, coral, and a crew that actually knows where the fish are.

No price data on hand, but 530 five-star ratings say book it before it sells out.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
